/home/runner/work/eckit/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++  -pipe -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-sign-compare -O3 -DNDEBUG     -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/dhcopy.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/dhcopy.dir/dhcopy.cc.o -o eckit-dhcopy  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/eckit/eckit/_codeql_build_dir/lib ../../lib/libeckit_option.so ../../lib/libeckit.so -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -ldl
